offer: For construction contractors managing 5–10 projects simultaneously, delays in project timelines cause penalties and cost overruns. We provide a tracking system instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: delays in project timelines leading to penalties and cost overruns
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Community forums for sharing construction tools
try_it: Let users try timeline visualization and delay notifications on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Short demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing project data
